title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Atlas, Vegapunk as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 26 years ago - punk hazard

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I implore you, vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please aid us in our research!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is imperative that we study the void century!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world's history can't remain shredded in darkness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our research requires expertise in numerous fields.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I work for the government now; I can't afford to leak my findings!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Grow WU!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times have they caught you anyway?! Open your eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't you see why they keep letting you go free?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're hoping to flush out your allies! Stand down!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let the past remain shrounded. You won't find the answer to good and evil in a bunch of old stories!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I once knew someone who carried a D. in their name...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was killed right in front of me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We grew up together...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He was my big brother...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: my real name is claimh d. clover!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: W-We were only friends!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On that day, I lied to save myself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Tell me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How am I meant to accept a world where you can die just for having the wrong name?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: History will only continue to be suppressed, and the people will never know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll forget about what you just told me, but I'm afraid I can't help you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Do your best to stay safe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: VEGAPUNK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The voices of the past gall out to you!! Just wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll solve this puzzle... and when I do, you won't be able to ignore them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 22 years ago

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ohara came face to face with a buster call!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take a look! It's the biggest massacre ever!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They finally got that archeologist, Clover! SHU RO RO RO RO RO RO RO RO RO RO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what happens when you look into the void century!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No one's gonna make that mistake again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I implore you, vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, it looks like some brat survived!!

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: You must've had a chance to escape...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Clover...

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
